feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Abandoned Avatar
entry.summary:
Author: SterekTw

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,236Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 93

Summary: After being tortured by Gerard Stiles gets kicked out of the pack and abonded by his friends. The sheriff sends him to his mother's brother to stay for the summer but the world is in danger and Stiles and his new friends seem to be the only ones who can save it..

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,348Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,131Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,688Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 280

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.summary:
Author: Lord_Vale

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,217Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Derek has sense memories from his life before the fire. Sometimes they come back in ways he wishes he could forget. And other times, he’s reminded maybe he isn’t entirely alone anymore.

entry.title: Possibilities
entry.summary:
Author: Sam_your_m0m

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,279Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 20

Summary: A few things were not meant to happen during the course of life, the world shouldn't have seen some mysteries: the birth of Mieczysław Genim Stilinski should've been one of those things. He was five years old when he learned that the world didn't like that he was alive, and he was nine when he understood why. Or in wich stiles is a spark and he is too smart for his own good.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,233Chapters: 4/40Kudos: 12

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,129Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 186

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,579Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 205

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: everyonelovesLaurence

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,353Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: The only radio show playing at Hale's Auto is 'Around Beacon Hills', the local community radio hosted by some funny, smart guy named Stiles. It's ridiculous to have a crush on a radio host you've never met. But Derek manages anyway. Erica approves.

entry.title: kiss it better
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,450Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Derek goes absolutely feral for Stiles’ mouth on him, wherever and whenever he can get it, but on and in his ass makes him the craziest, and Stiles can’t help but reward him for being so very good by expressing what he wants, letting himself have this, allowing himself to enjoy Stiles making him feel good. “You are my good boy, aren’t you, Derek?” Stiles asks with a hint of a smirk, as he shifts his own position to get closer to Derek’s pert ass. “Yes,” Derek whispers, gaze locked with Stiles’ again, breathing heavily. “Yes, what?” Stiles quirks a brow. "Yes, Daddy."

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,976Chapters: 5/13Kudos: 91

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: a bad moon on the rise
entry.summary:
Author: lscar123

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,519Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 58

Summary: After surprising returns, everyone wants things to go back to normal. Even if normal doesn't exist anymore. Stiles still isn't sleeping, and his magic seems to have a mind of its own. Derek wants all the people in his life to be happy, and that means he's somehow found himself as the voice of reason. Laura is trying to hold everything together for everyone, even if it means she has to neglect herself. But Beacon Hills refuses to stay quiet for long. They were warned of incoming danger, and now there's a pack of Alpha werewolves on their doorstep looking for revenge.

entry.summary:
Author: moon_stargazer

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,822Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 29

entry.summary:
Author: WereAllGoingtoHell

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,350Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 54
